title: biophytum molle
intro: Biophytum molle, also known as "varanivallam" or "lifesaver plant," is a unique, perennial plant that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Biophytum molle include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help manage diabetes, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Biophytum molle can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
